mapper.select: SELECT c.ordinal_position AS columnId, c.column_name AS columnName, CASE WHEN c.data_type = 'character varying' THEN 'varchar(' || c.character_maximum_length || ')' WHEN c.data_type = 'character' THEN 'char(' || c.character_maximum_length || ')' WHEN c.data_type = 'numeric' THEN CASE WHEN c.numeric_scale = 0 AND c.numeric_precision IS NOT NULL THEN 'numeric(' || c.numeric_precision || ')' WHEN c.numeric_precision IS NOT NULL THEN 'numeric(' || c.numeric_precision || ',' || c.numeric_scale || ')' ELSE 'numeric' END WHEN c.data_type = 'timestamp without time zone' THEN 'timestamp' WHEN c.data_type = 'timestamp with time zone' THEN 'timestamptz' WHEN c.data_type = 'time without time zone' THEN 'time' WHEN c.data_type = 'time with time zone' THEN 'timetz' WHEN c.data_type = 'double precision' THEN 'double precision' WHEN c.data_type = 'real' THEN 'real' ELSE c.data_type END AS dataType, COALESCE(col_dsc.description::text, '') AS comments, CASE WHEN pk.column_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' END AS isPri, CASE WHEN c.is_nullable = 'NO' THEN 'Y' END AS isNotNull, c.column_default AS defaultVal FROM information_schema.columns c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT kcu.table_name, kcu.column_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY' ) pk ON c.table_name = pk.table_name AND c.column_name = pk.column_name LEFT JOIN pg_class cls ON cls.relname = c.table_name JOIN pg_namespace ns ON cls.relnamespace = ns.oid AND ns.nspname = current_schema() LEFT JOIN pg_description col_dsc ON col_dsc.objoid = cls.oid AND col_dsc.objsubid = c.ordinal_position WHERE c.table_name = #{tableName} ORDER BY c.ordinal_position

SELECT c.relname AS tableName, COALESCE(dsc.description::text, '') AS comments FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace ns ON c.relnamespace = ns.oid AND ns.nspname = current_schema() LEFT JOIN pg_description dsc ON dsc.objoid = c.oid AND dsc.objsubid = 0 WHERE c.relname = #{tableName} AND c.relkind = 'r'

SELECT c.column_name AS columnName, c.data_type AS dataType, c.numeric_precision AS numPre, c.numeric_scale AS numSca, COALESCE(col_dsc.description::text, '') AS comments, CASE WHEN pk.column_name IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isPri FROM information_schema.columns c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT kcu.table_name, kcu.column_name FROM information_schema.table_constraints tc JOIN information_schema.key_column_usage kcu ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema WHERE tc.constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY' ) pk ON c.table_name = pk.table_name AND c.column_name = pk.column_name LEFT JOIN pg_class cls ON cls.relname = c.table_name JOIN pg_namespace ns ON cls.relnamespace = ns.oid AND ns.nspname = current_schema() LEFT JOIN pg_description col_dsc ON col_dsc.objoid = cls.oid AND col_dsc.objsubid = c.ordinal_position WHERE c.table_name = #{tableName} ORDER BY c.ordinal_position
